LocaleResource.Name: NopAdvance.DiscountRules.CartSubTotal
LocaleResource.Value: Minimum cart subtotal should be x.xx amount

LocaleResource.Name: NopAdvance.DiscountRules.CartSubTotal.Admin.Fields.CartSubTotal.Hint
LocaleResource.Value: Discount will be applied if customer's cart sub-total is equal or greater than the specified amount.

LocaleResource.Name: NopAdvance.DiscountRules.CartSubTotal.Admin.Fields.CartSubTotal.Positive
LocaleResource.Value: Sub-total amount must be greater than zero(0).

LocaleResource.Name: NopAdvance.DiscountRules.CartSubTotal.Admin.ErrorMessage
LocaleResource.Value: This plugin only works with those discounts where "Discount type" is set to "Assigned to order sub-total".
